languages.text: "Вы в моем дворце. Кого еще вы ожидали здесь увидеть?" {n}Несмотря на всеобъемлющую аугментацию, доносящийся через вокс-решетку голос не лишен легкого раздражения.{/n} "Сенешаль, соизвольте".

"You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."
languages.original_text: "Вы в моем дворце. Кого еще вы ожидали здесь увидеть?" {n}Несмотря на всеобъемлющую аугментацию, доносящийся через вокс-решетку голос не лишен легкого раздражения.{/n} "Сенешаль, соизвольте".

traits.locale_text: "You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

"You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

"You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

languages.text: “你就站在我的宫殿里。你还指望在这儿见到谁？”{n}尽管已经被植入物深度改造，那透过音阵格栅传来的声音，仍不免带着一丝火气。{/n}“总领，有劳了。”
languages.original_text: "You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

traits.locale_text: “你就站在我的宫殿里。你还指望在这儿见到谁？”{n}尽管已经被植入物深度改造，那透过音阵格栅传来的声音，仍不免带着一丝火气。{/n}“总领，有劳了。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes ici dans mon palais. Qui d'autre espériez-vous y trouver ? » {n}Malgré un niveau d'augmentation démesuré, la voix qui s'élève de la grille-vox trahit une certaine irritation.{/n} « Sénéchale... »
languages.original_text: "You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes ici dans mon palais. Qui d'autre espériez-vous y trouver ? » {n}Malgré un niveau d'augmentation démesuré, la voix qui s'élève de la grille-vox trahit une certaine irritation.{/n} « Sénéchale... »

languages.text: "Sarayıma gelmişsin. Başka kimi görmeyi bekliyordun?" {n}Aşırı düzeydeki ogmentasyona rağmen voks ızgarasından gelen ses, ufak da olsa öfkesini belli ediyor.{/n} "Seneşal, takdim et."
languages.original_text: "You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

traits.locale_text: "Sarayıma gelmişsin. Başka kimi görmeyi bekliyordun?" {n}Aşırı düzeydeki ogmentasyona rağmen voks ızgarasından gelen ses, ufak da olsa öfkesini belli ediyor.{/n} "Seneşal, takdim et."

languages.text: «Está ante mi palacio. ¿A quién esperaba encontrar si no?». {n}A pesar del elevado nivel de aumento, la voz que emite el voco sigue expresando cierta irritación.{/n} «Senescal, por favor».
languages.original_text: "You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

traits.locale_text: «Está ante mi palacio. ¿A quién esperaba encontrar si no?». {n}A pesar del elevado nivel de aumento, la voz que emite el voco sigue expresando cierta irritación.{/n} «Senescal, por favor».

languages.text: "Ihr steht in meinem Palast. Wen sonst hattet Ihr hier erwartet?" {n}Trotz der überwältigen Zahl von Augmentationen schwingt in der Stimme, die aus dem Vox-Gitter ertönt, ein Hauch von Verärgerung mit.{/n} "Truchsessin, waltet Eures Amtes."
languages.original_text: "You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr steht in meinem Palast. Wen sonst hattet Ihr hier erwartet?" {n}Trotz der überwältigen Zahl von Augmentationen schwingt in der Stimme, die aus dem Vox-Gitter ertönt, ein Hauch von Verärgerung mit.{/n} "Truchsessin, waltet Eures Amtes."

languages.text: 「あなたは私の宮殿に立っています。他に誰を期待していたのですか？」{n}増幅の度合いが非常に高いにもかかわらず、ヴォックス・グリルの通る声にはわずかな苛立ちが感じられる。{/n}「執事、どうぞ。」
languages.original_text: "You are standing in my palace. Whom else did you expect to see here?" {n}Despite the overwhelming degree of augmentation, the voice coming through the vox-grille is not without a touch of irritation.{/n} "Seneschal, if you will."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは私の宮殿に立っています。他に誰を期待していたのですか？」{n}増幅の度合いが非常に高いにもかかわらず、ヴォックス・グリルの通る声にはわずかな苛立ちが感じられる。{/n}「執事、どうぞ。」
